title: Cauthon Mob Spawn Disabling
description: a simple plugin that disables selected mobs from being spawned
body:
## Configuration
### Data Storage
The plugin stores the blacklisted mob names in a text file called blacklist.txt located in the plugin's data folder (plugins/CauthonMobDisable/). The file format is simple; each line contains one mob name.

### Blacklist File Management
Load Blacklist: The plugin automatically loads the blacklist from the file when enabled.

Save Blacklist: The plugin saves the updated blacklist to the file whenever mobs are added or removed from the blacklist.

## Commands
### Command Usage
The plugin provides the following commands for managing mob spawning:

/cauthonmobdisable [MobName]: Disables the specified mob from spawning. The mob will be added to the blacklist, and any existing instances will be removed.

/cauthonmobenable [MobName]: Enables the specified mob to spawn again. The mob will be removed from the blacklist.

### Command Examples

/cauthonmobdisable ZOMBIE: This will disable zombies.

/cauthonmobenable SKELETON: This will disable skeletons.

We have a discord now!!! [https://discord.gg/62493Tu5AD](https://discord.gg/62493Tu5AD)
